name: Kangaroo Beach
overview: Welcome to Kangaroo Beach, a sun-soaked seaside paradise, populated by a kooky cast of colourful animals. This seemingly idyllic haven is never far from peril, but beachgoers are safe, thanks to the courageous lifesavers on patrol.

trailers.title: Kangaroo Beach OFFICIAL TRAILER | ABC Kids
KANGAROO BEACH TRAILER 2 | Coming to ABC Kids in January 2021!
